comment: FRN-focused mini-book for Tier 2.3.2 mid-period reconciliation. CORP_SOFR_FRN sits inside its 2025-05-08 → 2025-08-08 coupon period, with two prior coupons already paid (2025-02-10, 2025-05-08). Exercises the multi-coupon ARRC compounding path — the same FRN at 2025-12-31 only had one in-progress period. SYNTH_CALLABLE_SOFR_FRN exercises the ARRC compound-in-arrears × workout-bullet truncation intersection: settlement 2025-06-30 sits inside its 2025-05-15 → 2025-08-15 coupon period and the bond is callable starting 2027-11-15.

instruments.description: MMC $300M FRN due 2027-11-08, Compounded SOFR + 65bps. Mid-period valuation snapshot.
instruments.current_reset_rate_pct_note: Same bond as in book.json; current_reset_rate_pct is informational only — the ARRC pricer uses sofr_fixings.csv directly.

instruments.description: Same synthetic 5Y callable SOFR FRN as in book.json, viewed mid-period on 2025-06-30 (inside its 2025-05-15 → 2025-08-15 coupon window). Exercises ARRC compound-in-arrears × workout-bullet DM-to-worst on both libraries.
instruments.source: Synthetic — see book.json for the rationale.
instruments.current_reset_rate_pct_note: Informational only; ARRC pricer uses sofr_fixings.csv directly.
